languages.text: "Боль лишь инструмент, с помощью которого живая плоть сообщает о разрушительном воздействии на нее. Используя его, я получаю наиболее полные, а значит — ценные сведения о последствиях своих манипуляций".

"Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."
languages.original_text: "Боль лишь инструмент, с помощью которого живая плоть сообщает о разрушительном воздействии на нее. Используя его, я получаю наиболее полные, а значит — ценные сведения о последствиях своих манипуляций".

"Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."

"Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."

languages.text: "Schmerz ist nur das Instrument, mit dem uns lebendes Fleisch auf seine Zerstörung hinweist. Ich nutze dieses Werkzeug, um vollständige und damit überaus wertvolle Informationen über die Folgen meiner Prozeduren zu erhalten."
languages.original_text: "Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."

traits.locale_text: "Schmerz ist nur das Instrument, mit dem uns lebendes Fleisch auf seine Zerstörung hinweist. Ich nutze dieses Werkzeug, um vollständige und damit überaus wertvolle Informationen über die Folgen meiner Prozeduren zu erhalten."

languages.text: « La douleur n'est que le moyen par lequel la chair nous prévient qu'elle subit des effets délétères. Je me sers de cet outil pour obtenir les informations les plus complètes possibles, et donc les plus précieuses, sur les conséquences de mes procédures. »
languages.original_text: "Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."

traits.locale_text: « La douleur n'est que le moyen par lequel la chair nous prévient qu'elle subit des effets délétères. Je me sers de cet outil pour obtenir les informations les plus complètes possibles, et donc les plus précieuses, sur les conséquences de mes procédures. »

languages.text: “痛苦，不过是活体组织向我们发出的警示信号，用以提示其正在遭受损害。我正利用这一信号以获取关于我的手术结果最完整、因而也最具价值的反馈数据。”
languages.original_text: "Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."

traits.locale_text: “痛苦，不过是活体组织向我们发出的警示信号，用以提示其正在遭受损害。我正利用这一信号以获取关于我的手术结果最完整、因而也最具价值的反馈数据。”

languages.text: «El dolor es solo el modo que la carne viva tiene de alertar de una situación deletérea. Lo uso como herramienta para obtener información más completa y, por lo tanto, más valiosa, sobre las consecuencias del procedimiento».
languages.original_text: "Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."

traits.locale_text: «El dolor es solo el modo que la carne viva tiene de alertar de una situación deletérea. Lo uso como herramienta para obtener información más completa y, por lo tanto, más valiosa, sobre las consecuencias del procedimiento».

languages.text: "教養のあるあなたなら、痛みの本質を知っているに違いないでしょう？痛みとは、生きた肉体がその肉体に及ぼす破壊的影響を伝える道具にすぎない。それを使うことで、私は自分の操作の効果について最も完全で、それゆえに貴重な情報を得ることができる"{n}エオガンヌはサーボスカルに目をやり、顔をしかめた。{/n}"いや、同僚よ、君はそれを自己破壊と勘違いしている"
languages.original_text: "Surely you must know the nature of pain, as an educated man, right? Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh communicates the destructive effects on it. By using it, I gain the most complete, and therefore valuable, information about the effects of my manipulations." {n}Eoghanne quickly raises his eyes to the servo-skull and frowns.{/n} "No, colleague, you mistake that for self-destruction."

languages.text: "Acı, canlı etin bizi üzerindeki zararlı etkilere karşı uyardığı bir araçtır. Ben bu aracı prosedürlerimin sonuçları konusunda en eksiksiz ve dolayısıyla en değerli bilgileri edinmek için kullanıyorum."
languages.original_text: "Pain is merely the instrument by which living flesh alerts us to deleterious effects upon it. I am using this tool to receive the most complete and, thus, the most valuable information about the consequences of my procedures."
